cards.back: The process of enhancing image quality by removing degradative effects, such as noise, blur, and distortions.
A technique used to remove random fluctuations in an image, such as salt and pepper noise, to improve image quality.
A technique used to remove noise from an image, resulting in a cleaner and more detailed representation of the original image.
A technique used to remove blur from an image, resulting in a sharper and more detailed representation of the original image.
A method used in image restoration to estimate the most likely image given a set of observations, often used in Bayesian inference.
